name: ExtensionDeviceAssociation_Device
title: R5: Reference to the devices associated with the patient or group (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DeviceAssociation.device` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DeviceAssociation.device` 1..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DeviceAssociation.device` 1..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DeviceAssociation.device` has a context of Device based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Device`.
Element `DeviceAssociation.device` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
